series_description: Payroll records include time reports, requests for leave, and all documents pertaining to employees sick leave, vacation, personal or miscellaneous time taken.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 10 years after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released

series_description: Form granting the certificate of certified public accountants.
retention_statement: Paper: Until scanned, or two months after death of certificate holder, ; Electronic: Until two months after death of certificate holder,

series_description: The licensee's application history file contains application for admission to exam, application for certification or registration, and the certificate number and date of issuance.
retention_statement: Paper: Until scanned, or two months after death of certificate holder, ; Electronic: Until two months after death of certificate holder,

series_description: This record shows legal basis for registraton as a public accountant. Includes application for registration as a public accountant, correspondence to and from the applicant/licensee, education records and information, and verification of experience forms. May also contain equivalent examination applications, ethics exam results, renewal information, continuing education reporting forms, and requests for license verification.
retention_statement: Paper: Until scanned or for two months after death of licensee ; Electronic: Until two months after death of certificate holder

series_title: CONTINUING EDUCATION REPORT FORMS AND DOCUMENTATION
series_description: The continuing education application shows the basis of continuing education credits for maintaining CPA or PA license, including Continuing Education Report forms, certificates of completion or other verification of continuing education completed for the reporting timeframe, submitted either at the time of license renewal, upon request for a practicing permit, or for continuing education verification.
retention_statement: Paper: Until scanned or for three years after new form is submitted ; Electronic: Until two months after death of certificate holder

series_description: The firm registration applications show the legal basis for registration for CPA and PA firms. Records may include application for registration or renewal of registration, firm employee listings, business letterhead, liability insurance information, peer review compliance documentation, peer review exemption forms, and peer review compliance reporting forms.
retention_statement: Paper: Until scanned, or three years after the firm is placed out of business ; Electronic: For tax firms, three years after the firm is placed out of business; for peer review firms, six years after the firm is placed out of business

series_title: CERTIFICATION AND GRADE VERIFICATION TO EXTERNAL ENTITIES
series_description: Correspondence issued to other state Boards of Accountancy verifying certification or passing grades on the CPA examination.
retention_statement: Paper: Until scanned, or two months after death of certificate holder ; Electronic: Until two months after death of certificate holder

series_description: Files documenting the process by which applicants file for education assistance funds, including the application for education assistance funds, educational transcripts, FAFSA forms and information, college course and tuition information, amount of monies disbursed to applicant, and correspondence to and from the applicant.
retention_statement: Electronic: Until proof of completion of at least one section of the CPA Exam for fund recipients ; Paper: Until proof of completion of at least one section of the CPA Exam for fund recipients; Until one year has elapsed since the application was approved, but no funds requested. Until six months after the applicant is notified of the denial of their request.

series_description: Investigative proceedings are files that document the activities of the Board staff in investigating complaints and possible disciplinary actions against licensees, including: public complaint forms and attached documentation, correspondence to and from the complainant and/or respondent, referral notices from external agencies, court proceedings and outcomes, licensing information, field call photographs and summaries, cease and desist notices, notice of opportunity for hearing letters, hearing scheduling letters, interview and phone notes, hearing exhibits, hearing outcome letters, adjudication orders, revocation notices, court filings, subpoenas, close case letters and requests for information/documents.
retention_statement: Paper: If proceedings result in board action, retain until scanned, or for five years; adjudication Orders are maintained as part of 889-0016. If the investigation does not result in board action, retain until scanned, or for two years. ; Electronic: Five years If proceedings result in board action; adjudication Orders are maintained as part of the license file under 889-0016; If the investigation does not result in board action, retain until scanned, or for two years.

series_description: The application for individual license renewal shows the basis for issuance of certified public accountant and public accountant licenses, including address and phone number, military history, education information, current and previous employer information, continuing education reporting, public accounting firm affiliation and/or registration, attestations and signatures. Series also may include fee and payment information.
retention_statement: Paper: Until a machine readable version has been created and verified for accuracy, or 6 months after audit by Auditor of State audit report is released, ; Electronic: Until two months after death of certificate holder,

series_description: Correspondence and information relating to various topics which do not directly affect office or board functions, policies or procedures.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one (1) year maximum after the end of the calendar year in which created/received ; Electronic: Retain one (1) year maximum after the end of the calendar year in which created/received

series_description: Travel expense reports that are completed by employees showing dates and place of travel and expenditures.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain one (1) year after audit by Auditor of State audit report is released

series_description: Documentation pertaining to the transfer of funds and/or expenditure of funds. Includes requests to the controlling board, requests for out of state travel, and allotment requests.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain three (3) years after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released

series_description: Documentation pertaining to the receipt of funds; including revenue receipts, remittance to the Depository Trust, and requisition to Depository Trust.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain three (3) years after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released

series_description: Records include central office supply requisitions, printing requisitions, purchase orders, and inter-departmental purchase orders.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain three (3) years after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released

series_description: Background check results received from Ohio Bureau of Criminal Investigation (BCI) with WebCheck results for BCI and Federal Bureau of Investigations that are reviewed as part of the initial CPA certification process.
retention_statement: Paper: One year from the date of issuance by BCI

series_title: Audio and Working Notes from Stated Board and Committee Meetings
series_description: Audio recordings and working notes for purposes of transcribing minutes of stated Board meetings and Board committee meetings.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain working notes until minutes of the associated meeting are approved by the Board. ; Electronic: Retain audio until minutes of the associated meeting are approved by the Board.

series_title: Monthly CPA Certification Lists and Tally Sheets
series_description: Lists of applicants newly certified who are subject to a spot-audit to ensure they have met all qualifications for initial certification.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until the audit report covering the fiscal year of the documents has been issued. ; Electronic: Retain until the audit report covering the fiscal year of the documents has been issued.

series_description: Historical Record Summaries of CPA Examination Grades and Statistics
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for five years ; Electronic: Retain for five years

series_title: CPE Sponsor Applications, Course Materials, Renewal Applications
series_description: Records pertaining to CPE sponsorship materials, including initial applications, course materials, and renewal applications.
retention_statement: Electronic: Two licensing cycles, or six years per OAC 4701-15-03 ; Paper: Until scanned

series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, posts made or approved by the Accountancy Board (ACC) on its public website and/or social media sites such as Facebook. LinkedIn, etc. that are made to promote the Board and share information that is of interest of the citizens of Ohio and the public. This information can include but is not limited to: press releases, photos, videos. events, meeting minutes, orders and decisions, announcements, frequently asked questions, annual reports, meeting schedules and information, information regarding education, experience, examination, application, and licensing requirements, and general information about ACC and the services it provides. Social media systems or platforms are maintained by the owners of the systems or platforms and not ACC.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until updated or no longer of administrative value.
